scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c yellow,cyan "cross-env NODE_ENV=development HOST=0.0.0.0 PORT=3001 SERVE_FRONTEND=false npm run dev --workspace backend" "wait-on http-get://127.0.0.1:3001/health && npm run dev --workspace frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace backend && npm run build --workspace frontend
scripts.test:guards: node backend/src/tests/12-whatsapp-status-guard.js && node backend/src/tests/14-browser-runtime.js && node backend/src/tests/15-browser-runtime-guard.js && node backend/src/tests/17-keepalive-stability.js && node backend/src/tests/18-painel-snapshot.js
